name: Causal Methods
description: Time-series causal inference and statistical validation methods.

name: AI Evaluation
description: Methodology-led AI safety evaluation: real evals, calibration, anti-overclaim discipline.

name: Course Notes
description: Long-form study notes synthesized from technical courses. DLAI is the first; more course-derived notes lined up.

name: Where this is going
description: Where the work is heading: a foundations book on sequence models (SSMs / Mamba) and an RL + control-theory guide.

name: Published Research
description: Shipped guides and long-form books: interview-prep guides, an agentic-coding book, and formal Definition–Theorem–Proof mathematical guides.

name: Research Infrastructure
description: The search, memory, and agent tooling I built to accelerate my own research and learning — it powers the citation-graph demo and the study-notes pipeline.

name: Publishing Infrastructure
description: The reusable scaffold and deploy pipeline behind every book and guide here: npm-published, dogfooded across projects.

name: Pricing Decision Systems
description: Annuity pricing and insurance-risk valuation — a Python pricing library and an AI/ML actuarial toolkit, with a companion Julia stack. Earlier domain work, intentionally not the lead.
